subcodes.first_line: How many nights and days have all beings gazed toward the Supreme Horizon, beseeching from the True One that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه مقدار از لیالی و ایام که جمیع انام بافق اعلی ناظر و از حق مستدعی که بایام
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
